chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-311 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1446/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on CMA No.1447/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 06.03.2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate for petitioner.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
